name: Raisin Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:10
1. Cream the butter until light and fluffy using an electric mixer.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating at medium speed.
3. Add egg, and beat well.
4. Incorporate water and vanilla extract, mixing thoroughly.
5. Combine flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
6. Mix in the dry ingredients with the wet mixture until combined.
7. Stir in oats, pecans (if using), and raisins.
8. Drop dough by rounded teaspoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 to 12 minutes or until lightly browned.
10. Cool slightly on cookie sheets; remove to wire racks to cool completely.
Yield: about 8 dozen
